Bus Timings

13A Bus Schedule Al Qusais to Gold Souq Route

February 10, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

It is a renowned traditional market that features hundreds of jewelry shops, showcasing a dazzling display of intricate designs, from traditional to contemporary styles.

And if ask how to go there, we recommended you for taking the Bus. Yes, there is Bus ( 13 A Bus ) which connection Al Qusais Bus Station which is situated in 32nd Street, Muhaisnah 1, Mushrif, Dubai to the historic Gold Souq Bus Station, the duration of the trip is around 80 minutes. Contents

13A Bus Timetable

Bus 13A operates with a regular schedule, ensuring timely arrivals and departures for commuters. With convenient timings starting from early morning to late evening, passengers can plan their journeys with ease. As for the fare, Bus 13A offers an affordable option for travel within Dubai, making it accessible to all. And here is the 13a Bus timetable that you can save it or see from your phone.

From Al Qusais From Gold Souq
04:34 05:46
05:00 06:12
05:30 06:42
06:00 07:12
06:35 07:47
07:00 08:12
07:20 08:32
07:40 08:52
08:05 09:17
08:32 09:44
08:55 10:07
09:20 10:32
09:45 10:57
10:08 11:20
10:30 11:42
10:55 12:07
11:25 12:37
11:50 13:02
12:20 13:32
12:45 13:57
13:15 14:27
13:45 14:57
14:15 15:27
14:40 15:52
15:05 16:17
15:35 16:47
16:05 17:17
16:35 17:47
17:00 18:12
17:25 18:37
17:50 19:02
18:15 19:27
18:45 19:57
19:10 20:22
19:35 20:47
20:00 21:12
20:25 21:37
20:50 22:02
21:20 22:32
21:48 23:00
22:15 23:27
22:45 23:57

Download PDF Bus 13A

This timetable provides the departure time from each bus stop along the route, allowing passengers to plan their journey accordingly.

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the 13A Bus Timings.## About Bus 13A

Dubai’s public transportation system is renowned for its efficiency and convenience, and Bus 13A is no exception. Operating between Al Qusais and Gold Souq, this route serves as a vital link for commuters, offering a glimpse into the city’s dynamic landscape. And it operates everyday.

Step aboard Bus 13A, where comfort meets convenience. Equipped with modern amenities and spacious seating, passengers can relax and enjoy the journey as they traverse through Dubai’s bustling streets. The air-conditioned interiors provide respite from the city’s scorching heat, ensuring a pleasant ride for all travelers.Read Also: Dubai to Fujairah Bus Timing ## 13A Bus Route

Our journey begins at Al Qusais Bus Station, a bustling transportation hub located in the heart of the Al Qusais neighborhood.

From here, we embark on a scenic route, passing through a series of diverse stops that showcase Dubai’s rich tapestry of cultures and communities. The complete list of stops includes:

  1. Al Qusais Bus Station

  2. Muhaisnah 2, Masjid Hamad Abdul Karim

  3. Muhaisnah 2, Al Shirawi Labour Camp

  4. Muhaisnah 2, Entrance

  5. Public Transport Agency

  6. Lebanese Private School 11

  7. Muhaisnah 4, New Housing

  8. Emirates Housing

  9. Russian International School

  10. Galadari Driving School

  11. Al Huraiz Establishment

  12. Al Nahda, The Sheffield Private School

  13. Al Nahda, Zuleikha Hospital

  14. Al Nahda, Park

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Ministry of Human Resources & Emiratisation

  2. Emirates Driving Institute

  3. Sheikh Rashid Colony 1-2

  4. Al Nahda Bus Stop

  5. Ministry of Information

  6. Al Nahda, Shabab Alahli Club

  7. Al Jadeed Bakery

  8. Dubai Scout Mission

  9. Hor Al Anz, Mashreq Bank

  10. Abu Baker Al Siddique Bus Stop

  11. Muraqqabat, Police Station

  12. Crowne Plaza Hotel Deira

  13. Reef Mall

  14. Salah Al Din Bus Stop

  15. Deira, Fish Roundabout

  16. Al Nakhal

  17. Burj Nahar, Intersection

  18. Naif Intersection

  19. Gold Souq Bus Station

Some other Dubai bus routes you can explore include the C18 bus route, which passes through Shaikh Rashid Colony and Lamcy Plaza, as well as the F26, which runs between Equiti Metro Landside and Onpassive Terminus.## Journey Experience

Starting in the quiet residential area of Al Qusais, the bus winds its way through the city, passing through the historic district of Deira, home to the famous Spice Souk and Gold Souk.

As the bus moves from the suburbs toward the bustling heart of Dubai, passengers can enjoy a blend of modern city life and traditional markets, with the Gold Souk at the end of the route showcasing an impressive array of gold, diamonds, and precious metals. This journey, while lengthy, provides an enriching experience, combining local culture with a glimpse of Dubai’s famous trading heritage.## Conclusion

In conclusion, a journey on Bus 13A from Al Qusais to Gold Souq is more than just a commute it’s an adventure through the heart of Dubai. And knowing the 13a bus timetable and route is very important to know before you get on the bus.

From the bustling streets of Al Qusais to the historic charm of Gold Souq, each stop along the way tells a story of Dubai’s past, present, and future.

So, hope aboard Bus 13A and embark on a journey of discovery through one of the world’s most dynamic cities.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: February 10, 2026.
